Description: Slow drip from hot water handle, getting worse
Notes: Plumber replaced washer. Fixed same week. Landlord responsive.

Description: One outlet near stove not working after circuit trip
Notes: Loose wire in the panel. Fixed. No cost to us.

Description: Baseboard heater in bedroom not cycling on
Notes: Replaced thermostat on unit. A week without heat in that room -- cold January. Landlord apologized.

Description: Porch door sticks badly, won't close flush in the rain
Notes: Nate planed the bottom edge and refinished it. Works fine now.

Description: Grout cracking and discoloring along shower pan
Notes: Contractor re-grouted the pan. Took longer than expected but clean now.

Description: Added a wall shelf in the kitchen for the dedicated GF prep area
Notes: Installed with landlord verbal approval. Reversible mounting.

Description: Window unit in living room dripping condensate inside
Notes: Nate re-seated the unit and adjusted tilt. No drip since.

Description: Fridge door seal starting to pull away at bottom left corner
Notes: Landlord provided a new gasket. Nate installed it. Works.

Description: Neighbor's car repeatedly in our assigned rear space
Notes: Landlord put up a sign. Has not been a recurring issue.

Description: Overhead kitchen light fixture humming and flickering
Notes: Ballast replaced. Fixed.

Description: Hall bulb out (our responsibility per lease)
Notes: Swapped to LED. Done same day.

Description: Low water pressure in kitchen sink, normal elsewhere
Notes: Aerator clogged with mineral buildup. Replaced. Normal pressure restored.

Description: One section of back porch railing loose, slightly wobbly
Notes: Landlord contractor re-fastened the balusters. Safe.

Description: Seasonal HVAC filter change (our responsibility per lease)
Notes: Nate keeps these on a quarterly rotation.

Description: Fan working but loud/rattling
Notes: Landlord took a while. Eventually sent someone. Fan replaced.

Description: Reinforced the counter shelf where Ruth's jar sits -- wobbled when leaned on
Notes: Screws on the shelf bracket were loose. Tightened in 5 minutes.

Description: Quarterly filter change
Porch light bulb out -- exterior, landlord fixture
Notes: Landlord acknowledged via text. Waiting on repair.

Description: Mild drip from cold water side -- same fixture as 2023 repair
Notes: Landlord aware. Plumber scheduled for December 15.

Description: Follow-up on faucet repair
Notes: Plumber re-repaired. Same washer. Landlord agreed to replace the whole faucet -- scheduled for January 2026.

Description: Landlord replaced kitchen faucet fully
Notes: New single-handle faucet. Works perfectly. No more drips.

Description: Quarterly filter change
Notes: Using higher MERV rating this time for air quality.
